deviations.what: the last column keeps the original sap.ui.model.type.Currency composite binding 1:1 - number={ parts:[{path:'PRICE'},{path:'CURRENCY_CODE'}], type:'sap.ui.model.type.Currency', formatOptions:{showMeasure:false} } over a numeric PRICE field (TYPE p) - via a raw binding-info string (client-side standard type, no framework change; the same idiom the curated samples use, e.g. z2ui5_cl_demo_app_369). Confirm the price renders formatted per currency.
the bound /ProductCollection shows a 6-row subset of the 123-row mock (ui5/mock/products.json); HT-1002 is not part of the subset.
